name: Hotel Nacional
title: Hotel Nacional Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Hotel Nacional Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A classic Cuban-style cocktail combining aged Bacardí rum with pineapple, lime, simple syrup, and apricot liqueur.
marketing_description: The Hotel Nacional was the epicenter of culture in Havana during the 1950s, and this cocktail brings you back to Cuba's Golden Age.

steps: Combine ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Fine strain into a chilled coupe glass.
Garnish with a pineapple leaf or a lime wheel.

garnish: pineapple leaf or a lime wheel
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Hotel Nacional 60 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum 22.5 ml pineapple juice 7.5 ml lime juice 7.5 ml simple syrup 15 ml apricot liqueur ... Combine ingredients in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake vigorously. Fine strain into a chilled coupe glass. Garnish with a pineapple leaf or a lime wheel.
